title: Home Page Rendering
steps: Assert main search bar is visible
expected_result: User should see the landing page with ads and search capability.

title: Navigation to Browse Ads
steps: Assert list of ads is displayed
expected_result: User should be taken to the ads listing page.

title: Ad Filtering (Wilaya)
steps: Select a Wilaya from the filter
Assert ads are filtered by location
expected_result: Ads should be filtered based on the selected region.

title: Login Flow (OTP)
expected_result: User should successfully authenticate and see their profile link.

title: Create Ad (Requires Auth)
expected_result: User should be able to create and view their own advertisement.
